scripts.ptau:contribute: snarkjs powersoftau contribute build/pot14_0000.ptau build/pot14_0001.ptau --name="First contribution" -v -e="random entropy"
scripts.ptau:prepare: snarkjs powersoftau prepare phase2 build/pot14_0001.ptau build/pot14_final.ptau -v
scripts.setup: snarkjs groth16 setup build/private_lp.r1cs build/pot14_final.ptau build/private_lp_0000.zkey
scripts.contribute: snarkjs zkey contribute build/private_lp_0000.zkey build/private_lp_final.zkey --name="1st Contributor" -v -e="random entropy 2"
scripts.vkey: snarkjs zkey export verificationkey build/private_lp_final.zkey build/verification_key.json
scripts.verify: snarkjs groth16 verify build/verification_key.json build/public.json build/proof.json
